pi_items.source: Task description line 2 specifies: 'Define a new instrument with the following exact specifications: Name: QUANTA'
Task description line 2 specifies: 'Tick Size: 0.05'. Note: NinjaTrader 8 default tick size for stocks is 0.01 (verified via forum posts), but task explicitly requires 0.05
Task description line 2 specifies: 'Point Value: 1'. Standard for stock instruments in NinjaTrader 8 (verified via documentation: non-currency instruments use 1.0)
Task description line 2 specifies: 'Master Instrument: Stock'

Task description line 4 specifies: 'Save the export file to: C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\NinjaTraderTasks\QUANTA_Definition.xml (or .zip if prompted)'. Metadata specifies .zip format. NinjaTrader 8 backup files use .nt8bk extension but can be renamed to .zip to open as standard zip archive (verified via forum posts)

privileged_info_summary: This is a synthetic task for NinjaTrader 8 involving creation of a custom instrument. The task requires defining an instrument named QUANTA with Master Instrument type Stock, Point Value 1.0, Tick Size 0.05 (non-standard for stocks; typical default is 0.01), and US Dollar currency. The instrument definition should be exported to a .zip file at C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\NinjaTraderTasks\QUANTA_Definition.zip. All metadata claims correctly reflect the explicit task requirements.
